intro: The Rotang melanoloma, also known as the "Ratanjot" or "Indian Rubia", is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which have been shown to provide relief from digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory conditions.
